zh.lifeSummary: 當Ada Gifford於1257年出生在英國蘇格蘭易亞斯特 洛迪安也斯特也斯特 卡素時，她的父親Bartholomew Giffard30歲，母親Joan de Halsbury26歲。她於1272年與Andrew Gray Lord of Broxmouth在英國蘇格蘭登迪結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1300年在蘇格蘭享年43歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ada Gifford于1257年出生在英国苏格兰易亞斯特 洛迪安也斯特也斯特 卡素时，她的父亲Bartholomew Giffard30岁，母亲Joan de Halsbury26岁。她于1272年与Andrew Gray Lord of Broxmouth在英国苏格兰登迪结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1300年在苏格兰享年43岁。

nameMeanings.name: Gifford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Giffard, either from the Middle English personal name Gifard, derived from an Old French name of this form deriving from ancient Germanic geb- ‘give, gift’ + hard- ‘hardy, brave’, or perhaps sometimes a nickname from Old French gif(f)ard ‘chubby-cheeked, bloated’.

variants.name: Jeffords
meanings: English: variant of Gifford , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Ada
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of uncertain origin; it was not in general use before the late 18th century. It may be a Latinate variant of the biblical name Adah . However, it has also been explained as a pet form of Adele and Adelaide , Germanic female names of which the first element is adal ‘noble’. It was borne by a 7th-century abbess of Saint-Julien-des-Prés at Le Mans.

en.lifeSummary: When Ada Gifford was born in 1257, in Yester Castle, Yester, East Lothian, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Bartholomew Giffard, was 30 and her mother, Joan de Halsbury, was 26. She married Andrew Gray Lord of Broxmouth in 1272, in Dundee, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died in 1300, in Scotland, at the age of 43.

ko.Yester Castle, Haddingtonshire, Scotland: 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 로스이언 예스터 예스터 카스틀
ko.lifeSummary: Ada Gifford(이)가 1257년 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 로스이언 예스터 예스터 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Bartholomew Giffard(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan de Halsbury(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1272년 영국 스코틀랜드 던디에서 Andrew Gray Lord of Broxmouth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1300년 스컷랜드에서 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Yester Castle, Haddingtonshire, Scotland: иестир кастл, иестир, эаст лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ada Gifford родилась в 1257 г. в местности иестир кастл, иестир, эаст лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Bartholomew Giffard было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Halsbury, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Andrew Gray Lord of Broxmouth в 1272 г. в местности дунди, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла в 1300 г. в местности Шотландия в возрасте 43 лет.
